outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump says he's not thinking about Americans' financial situation 'even a little bit' in Iran talks
outlets.summary: Trump's comment that he doesn't think about Americans' financial pain sparked backlash. War cost now at $29 billion per Pentagon comptroller.

outlets.name: NBC News
outlets.headline: Trump says he's not thinking about Americans' finances 'even a little bit' in Iran negotiation
outlets.summary: NBC covers Trump's departure for Beijing and his comments dismissing Americans' financial pain from the Iran war.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth faces bipartisan scrutiny in Congress over mounting Iran war costs
outlets.summary: Defense Secretary Hegseth faced back-to-back hearings with bipartisan questioning on $29B war costs and lack of defined exit strategy.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: US ceasefire with Iran on 'life support' — Trump heading to Beijing with final warning
outlets.summary: Fox covers Trump's departure for Beijing with warning to Iran: 'Finish the job.' Rubio warns Iran leaders 'insane in the brain.'

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: 'Totally Unacceptable': Trump Rejects Iran Reply — 'They Will Be Laughing No Longer'
outlets.summary: Breitbart covers Trump's blunt rejection of Iran's proposal and emergency security meeting on resumed combat.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Iran war: Trump claims 'not long' before Iran war ends — departing for Beijing
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera liveblog: Kuwait reveals IRGC Bubiyan infiltration, Israel kills 13 in Lebanon, Kallas signals Aspides Hormuz extension, oil surges to $110.

outlets.name: Bloomberg
outlets.headline: Iran War Ceasefire Fragile as US Rejects Tehran's Latest Offer — Oil Rises
outlets.summary: Bloomberg covers ceasefire deterioration, oil surge to $110.43/bbl (+38.3%), and Saudi Aramco CEO's warning on 100M barrels/week lost.

outlets.name: CNBC
outlets.headline: What's at stake for trade, Taiwan and Iran in Trump's high-risk summit with China's Xi
outlets.summary: CNBC analyzes Trump-Xi Beijing summit stakes, including Iran pressure and oil markets.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Heading to China, Trump says US will 'finish the job' against Iran, 'peacefully or otherwise'
outlets.summary: ToI liveblog: Trump departure warnings, Israel strikes kill 13 in Lebanon, Kuwait IRGC infiltration revealed, EU Aspides pivot.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Hezbollah Fires Explosive Drones at Israel After Two Medics Reported Killed in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Haaretz covers Israeli strikes killing 13 in Lebanon and Hezbollah drone response.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Netanyahu says war 'not over' until Iran uranium removed — CBS 60 Minutes
outlets.summary: Netanyahu declared war not over, demanded physical removal of enriched uranium from Iran.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Pezeshkian vows talks with US 'not surrender' but defense of national interests
outlets.summary: Pezeshkian stated negotiations are not surrender but defense of Iranian national interests.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Tehran rejects US terms as hardliners push escalation ahead of Beijing summit
outlets.summary: Iran International reports deepening hardliner-pragmatist split in Tehran as Trump heads to Beijing. WSJ report on Mojtaba Khamenei's uncertain status cited.
